blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 29 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
